title: The Black Diamond Files: As Night Swallows Day
original_title: The Black Diamond Files: As Night Swallows Day
overview: Professional paranormal investigators decide to take a random drive to seek a cemetery located deep in the woods in Olalla WA. They soon discovered the cemetery on a rainy storm night what they captured for evidence is truly spine chilling. Something followed them home from their investigations and changed each one of their lives forever.
